title: (BUG) cli: peer_profiles grows without bound across reconnects
description: In the chat loop, peer_profiles (HashMap<String, HashMap<String,String>>) is populated by ClearMessage::Profile events from the DELIVER and SEALED_DELIVER handlers (lines 1185 and 1415) but is never cleared on Reconnecting or anywhere else in the session. Since profiles are bounded per peer (deserialize_profile_fields enforces 64 keys × 1 KB each), this is at most O(peers × 64 KB) — not a practical DoS in current usage — but it is a latent correctness issue: stale profile data from departed peers persists indefinitely. On a relay with a large rotating user population, the map will also grow monotonically. Fix: clear peer_profiles in the Reconnecting handler alongside online.clear().
